title: 2011 Press Releases
summary: This is a listing/index page aggregating Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2011. The page contains links to hundreds of diverse items including FOMC statements, enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, and other announcements. It is not a single archiveable document but rather a chronological index of disparate press releases.
key_points: This is a listing page, not an individual research document or data release
Contains links to multiple FOMC statements from 2011 (including statements, minutes, and projections)
Includes enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, and other announcements
Content is from 2011, approximately 15 years before the current date (2026)
No specific macro catalyst or market structure data is contained in this listing page itself
why_it_matters: This page is not suitable for individual archival as a research note. It is a navigation index that would need to be disaggregated into individual press releases for meaningful analysis. Any specific FOMC statements or data releases from 2011 would need to be accessed via their individual URLs.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page, which per RULE 5 requires rejection
Source contains only an index of links, not individual archiveable documents
Content is 15 years stale (2011) with no specific macro catalyst data on this page itself
No meaningful research, analysis, or data can be extracted from the listing page format
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' - no single event type applies to a listing page

notes: Non-archiveable: listing_page containing links to 2011 Federal Reserve press releases. Contains no specific macro catalyst or market structure data. Source is 15 years stale. Individual FOMC statements (e.g., 12/13/2011 FOMC statement, 11/2/2011 FOMC statement) would need to be accessed separately if archival is desired.
